title: Errors & Exceptions
source_outline: Errors vs exceptions: the exception hierarchy
Exception handling: try / except / else / finally
Handling multiple exceptions: multiple except blocks; grouped exceptions
Common exceptions: FileNotFoundError, ValueError, IOError, KeyError, IndexError, ZeroDivisionError, TypeError, AttributeError
Raising exceptions: the raise statement; custom exceptions (brief)

artifact_plan.depth_signals: Lab week (P5.1-P5.6); Core Concepts has 8 sub-concepts; Implementation warranted; picks up deferred FileNotFoundError thread from 7.1
artifact_plan.diagram_intent: exception-class inheritance tree (BaseException -> Exception -> LookupError/OSError/...) — catch-the-parent behavior and specific-to-general ordering both reference it

next_assessment.title: Python Foundations Diagnostic
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can model data with classes, handle files and errors robustly, and maintain a professional Git portfolio - confirming readiness to begin the AI modules.
